# Copilot Instructions

Read `AGENTS.md` in the repo root for full project context, commands, style guide, and boundaries.

## Key rules

- Run `node scripts/review.mjs <file>` on any document in `docs/` before committing. Do not claim a doc was reviewed unless the script actually ran.
- Follow `content/VOICE_BRIEF.md` for all public-facing copy (rule 8: say what we are, define by presence).
- Run `npm run build` before every commit.
